The story

A house becomes a home with a little work and a lot of heart.

I started @marcieshouseofdiys because I believed — and still believe — that beautiful spaces aren't reserved for big budgets or professional designers. Every room has potential. Every piece of furniture deserves a second look before it heads to the curb.

From coffered ceilings to custom closets, Roman shade upgrades to full bathroom renovations, I document every step so you can do it too.

Let's work together

Work with me

How I can help your space

01
DIY Consultation
One-on-one virtual session where we walk through your space, talk through your vision, and I give you a clear, step-by-step plan you can actually execute.
02
Room Renovation Plan
A detailed project roadmap — materials list, sequencing, budget estimate, and product recommendations — tailored to your specific room and skill level.
03
Brand Partnerships
Authentic collaborations with home, paint, hardware, and lifestyle brands that align with my community's values: quality, accessibility, and real results.
